messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I need some help with my recent orders and my account info. I just moved to a new house on the same street, and I noticed one of my orders is being sent to my old address. I’d like to update the shipping address for that order, and also make sure my default address is changed to my new place. Can you help with that?
